entry.title: Bill 68 (Hawaiʻi County): Postponed → —
entry.content:
INITIATES AN AMENDMENT TO ARTICLE VI OF THE CHARTER OF THE (Draft 2) COUNTY OF HAWAI‘I (2024 EDITION), RELATING TO THE ESTABLISHMENT OF A DEPARTMENT OF BUILDING

Establishes a new Department of Building with the authority to regulate building and construction-related activities; creates a Director of Building position appointed by the Mayor and confirmed by the Council

Status: Postponed → —

Latest action: On agenda 2025-10-21

View on the council site

entry.title: New: Bill 68 (Hawaiʻi County) — Postponed
entry.content:
INITIATES AN AMENDMENT TO ARTICLE VI OF THE CHARTER OF THE (Draft 2) COUNTY OF HAWAI‘I (2024 EDITION), RELATING TO THE ESTABLISHMENT OF A DEPARTMENT OF BUILDING

Establishes a new Department of Building with the authority to regulate building and construction-related activities; creates a Director of Building position appointed by the Mayor and confirmed by the Council

Latest action: GOEAC: Bill 68, Draft 3 postponed to the Call of the Chair - 10/21/25

View on the council site
